name: Clicky Shell
description: Connects OpenClaw to the Clicky desktop shell for local speech, cursor presence, and screen-aware guidance.

shellLabel.label: Shell label
shellLabel.help: Friendly label for the connected Clicky shell.

registrationTtlMs.label: Registration TTL
registrationTtlMs.help: How long a shell registration remains fresh before OpenClaw treats it as stale.

allowRemoteDesktopShell.label: Allow remote desktop shell
allowRemoteDesktopShell.help: Allow Clicky shells that register through remote Gateway connections.
